As high school reaches its midpoint, Koichi Asakura—who dreams of studying design at art school—has his plans shaken by explosive graffiti on a museum wall. The artist is Eren Yamagishi, a left-handed girl who buried her talent after a past incident. Drawn together by art, Koichi pursues design as Eren returns to painting, but fear, ambition, and old scars threaten their paths.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: ヤニねこ

anime.description:
Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. She smokes so much that her apartment smells like ash and is littered with cigarette butts—and plenty of other trash! Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title.native: さよなら ララ

anime.description:
All because of "love"

Announced and revealed at Anime Central 2024's "Kinema Citrus Sweet 16: My Happy Marriage and What's New" panel, this anime follows a mermaid who makes a forbidden wish to be loved by a human. Following her death, she is reborn 200 years later into modern-day Japan in Lake Biwa, where she learns to adjust in a human world.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.romaji: Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
title.english: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
title.native: ふつつかな悪女ではございますが ~雛宮蝶鼠とりかえ伝~

anime.description:
As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death. Meanwhile, Reirin, now wearing the face of a scorned outcast, must answer for Keigetsu’s crimes in a dangerous trial.

The unlikely pair become increasingly entangled in each other’s lives and they will need to work together to survive after discovering the dark conspiracies brewing beneath the palace's genial surface. To confront the deadly threats lurking in the shadows, Reirin must embrace her new identity and defy their expectations of the court's inept villainess.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.romaji: Saijo no Osewa: Takane no Hanadarake na Meimonkou de, Gakuin Ichi no Ojou-sama (Seikatsu Nouryoku Kaimu) wo Kagenagara Osewa suru Koto ni Narimashita
title.english: Rich Girl Caretaker: I'm Secretly the Caregiver of the Most Popular Girl in This Rich Kid School
title.native: 才女のお世話 高嶺の花だらけな名門校で、学院一のお嬢様(生活能力皆無)を陰ながらお世話することになりました

anime.description:
A poor high school boy, Itsuki Tomonari, got caught up in a kidnapping attempt on Hinako Konohana, a young lady from one of Japan's largest conglomerates. On the surface, Hinako appears to be a brilliant and beautiful young woman, but in reality, she is a lazy girl with no life skills. However, due to family reasons, Hinako has to play the role of the "perfect young lady" at school. Wanting to protect her, Itsuki took on the job of caring for her. Eventually, Hinako began to spoil Itsuki with all her might -- "I don't want...... Itsuki to leave my side right now." This is a love story that begins beyond the master-servant relationship featuring a princess with a beautiful facade.

(Source: HJ Bunko, translated)

title.native: ワールド イズ ダンシング

anime.description:
Born into a life of acting and dance with a traveling theater troupe in 14th-century Japan, 12-year old Oniyasha has one problem—he doesn't know what the point of any of it is. "Why must I step with the left foot here instead of the right? Why is one performance good and another, bad? Why do people dance at all?" It all seems perfectly arbitrary, until a chance encounter in a run-down shack sets him down a path to revolutionizing the art form and influencing much of Japanese culture to come. A fictionalized account of the early life of Zeami Motokiyo (Oniyasha), the founder of modern Noh theater—the world's oldest surviving theater art—this coming-of-age artist's journey vividly brings to life a man far ahead of his time during one of Japan's most culturally and socially vibrant eras.

(Source: Kodansha Comics)

title.romaji: Boku no Hero Academia: I am a hero too
title.native: 僕のヒーローアカデミア I am a hero too

anime.description:
Following the broadcast of My Hero Academia Episode 170+1, the series' official website and accounts revealed that a new short anime adapting the "I Am a Hero Too" bonus chapter will tell the story of Eri as a high-schooler when it releases this summer.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.romaji: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH
title.native: 死亡遊戯で飯を食う。44:CLOUDY BEACH

anime.description:
Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.

This is the story of a certain insane world.

Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games.

Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki continues her journey. A game where death is always close at hand. Next, she takes on a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Eight players have gathered there. Among them are seasoned veterans whom Yuuki knows. The game is "Cloudy Beach." Beyond the wall, only those who have crossed the wall remain. Today, once again, she makes a living playing deadly games.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

title.native: モノノ怪 蛇神

anime.description: The third movie in the Mononoke movie trilogy.

title.native: LV999の村人

anime.description:
In this world, the concept of levels exist. Other than those who live off defeating monsters, most people are only around Level 1 to 5. What's more, not just anyone can go out to hunt monsters; it's heavily influenced by one's role anointed by god. There are eight such eligible roles. Warriors. Fighters. Clerics. Magicians. Rogues. Merchants. Hunters. Sorcerers. Those blessed with extraordinary power are divided into three types. Royalty. Heroes. Sages. But for the majority of the population, they have no such powers and live by farming or running shops. Towns are developed by those with the weakest role…Villagers.

For the powerless Villagers going out to hunt monsters is equivalent to committing suicide. But one day, a certain two-year-old child given the role of Villager notices something.

Once you defeat a monster… you can earn great wealth.

title.native: ONE PIECE HEROINES

anime.description:
Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, one chapter, “episode : NAMI” is getting an anime adaptation.

After buying poorly made shoes, Nami returns to the shop and meets Lebno, the designer. He offers to create a new pair from scratch, on the condition that she becomes his model. However, the craftsperson Miucha is the one who does the work.

(Source: Toei Animation Europe)

title.native: 仙逆

anime.description:
It tells the story of Wang Lin, an ordinary young man in the countryside, who is moved by his heart and cultivates against immortality. His pursuit is not only for longevity, but also for getting rid of the ants behind it. He firmly believed in human beings and entered the path of cultivation with mediocre qualifications. After experiencing ups and downs, with his wise mind, he gradually reached the pinnacle and became famous in the cultivation world with his own strength.

(Source: WeTV)

title.english: Kujima: Why Sing, When You Can Warble?
title.native: クジマ歌えば家ほろろ

anime.description:
In the fall of his first year of junior high school, Arata Kouda encountered a strange thing----. In this home comedy, a mysterious creature named “Kujima” brings new life to the Konohda family, where the atmosphere is slightly tense due to the concern for the eldest son, a ronin student who is preparing for the entrance examinations! By the way, the creature, who calls himself Kujima, speaks normal language and eats the same food as humans (or insects). Did he come from outer space, or did he...!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title.native: 大賢者リドルの時間逆行

anime.description:
The story follows Riddle, a young man who lost his companions to a mysterious group known as the "Box of Malice." On the brink of despair, after 1,000 years, Riddle eventually achieves the ability to reverse time. With a thousand years of knowledge and experience, the Great Sage Riddle journeys to the past.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: 청춘블라썸 : 우리의 봄

anime.description:
Oh, to be young and in love. Oh, to be wild and carefree. The springtime of life is intense, tumultuous, and at times, oh so confusing. Spring, summer, fall and winter -- love blossoms in all seasons.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title.native: 元祖！バンドリちゃん

anime.description:
After taking the girls' band world by storm, "BanG Dream Chan" is back!?

Get ready for a huge reunion with all your favorite pop and cute band members in the fun-filled girls' band comedy!

Come on, BanG Dream Chan! We are all BanG Dream Chan!

(Source: BanG Dream! GBP Twitter account)

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

title.romaji: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Kyuukei Jikan (Break Time) 4th Season
title.native: Re:ゼロから始める休憩時間(ブレイクタイム) 4th Season

anime.description: The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Kyuukei Jikan (Break Time).

title.native: 为喵人生

anime.description:
Ji Miaomiao, a young woman just starting her career, is betrayed by a friend and left with a mountain of debt. While fleeing from ruthless debt collectors, she accidentally falls from a building. On the brink of death, a mysterious figure transforms her into a cat.

By a twist of fate, she ends up being adopted—by none other than her own boss, Lu Chengze. Thus begins her strange and magical 100-day life... as a cat.

(Source: Bilibili)

title.native: 百鬼夜行抄

anime.description:
Ritsu inherited his sixth sense from his grandfather, along with a demon guardian named Blue Storm. Strange things just seem to happen around these two, and it's left to them to get to the bottom of all these mysterious events. Each story is independent but features recurring characters you'll come to know and appreciate as they, each in their own way, try to deal with things 'not of this world'.

(Source: MU)

title.native: mofusand

anime.description:
Shark Meow is an orange tabby kitty who wears a shark suit.
A little clumsy and always taking things at their own cozy pace,
but every day with their best kitty friends — and the rescued baby kitty, Little Meow —
is filled with unexpected little mishaps and sweet adventures.

A sunny warm spot in the park, the sparkle of the sea,
steam rising from freshly roasted sweet potatoes,
the fluttery feeling of the first snowfall…
These small everyday moments fill their world with warmth and delight.

You can’t help but smile and think, “So true!”
A soft and snuggly kitty anime that brings joy to everyday moments.

(Source: QTORY Channel)

title.native: キャンディーカリエス

anime.description:
Ame is a child who loves sweets, and the tooth decay that lives in her mouth called Caries. Caries lives a carefree life inside Ame's mouth and even calls her "Mama", and Ame's body is always at Caries' mercy.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title.native: 武神主宰 大威篇

anime.description: The second season of Wushen Zhuzai.

title.native: うごく！ねこむかしばなし

anime.description:
What if cats appeared in that story…? When beloved old tales and fairy stories are joined by cats, a surreal and heartwarming new adventure begins…!? Tabby cats, orange cats, calico cats, and white cats— a delightful mix of feline friends woven into timeless stories is sure to soothe the hearts of all humanity! A charming cat comedy is about to unfold!

(Source: AniOne Asia)

title.native: コアラ絵日記

anime.description:
The manga is about Koala who writes about daily life, whether it's good or bad, happy or sad, Koala treats every day as a precious day. Koala believes that today is a good day, and tomorrow will be a good day too.

(Source: Anime News Network)

title.native: 剑来 第二季

anime.description: The second season of Jian Lai.

title.native: ちびゴジラの逆襲(第3期)

anime.description: Sequel to Chibi Godzilla no Gyakushuu 2.

title.native: ぷちきゅあ～Precure Fairies～ シーズン3

anime.description:
In Season 3, in addition to the familiar Mysterious Amusement Park and Candy Paradise, many new locations—including a lively performance stage—will make their debut!

Furthermore, joining the ranks of our active heroes like PetitCure Mofurun and PetitCure Pollun, new friends such as PetitCure Purirun and PetitCure Meroron will also be appearing!

Everything is even cuter when you're with a friend! ♪

Please look forward to more heartwarming and humorous stories that will leave you feeling cozy and healed by all the cute PetitCure. ♡

(Source: Official Website)

title.native: 星辰变 最终季

anime.description: The final season of Xingchen Bian.

title.native: 非人哉 第三季 第二部分

anime.description: The third season part two of Fei Ren Zai.
